pageContext.name: Luffy Taro "Warriors Alliance"
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are excited to present the Luffy Taro 'Warriors Alliance' Collectible Figure!  Luffy joins the Warriors Alliance line from MegaHouse, nicknamed 'Luffy Taro'! Dressed in a ronin-inspired outfit, this figure stands about 6.7 inches tall, posed to fight his opponents.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your One Piece collection today!
